title: [non-record] byte jepa-lw naive experimental baseline 2.125 bpb @ 2000 cc @0hq
author: juvi21

data.description: Uses byte-level modeling with no tokenizer and byte 260.
Adds an exact next-byte compression objective on top of the JEPA loss so latent prediction affects likelihood.
Replaces the paper's pixel encoder with a byte transformer encoder.
Replaces action-conditioned prediction with causal chunk-context conditioning for byte compression.

data.component: predicted chunk latents injected into byte scorer
data.description: Injects predicted chunk latents into the byte scorer so JEPA influences exact likelihood.
Keeps latent prediction, batchnorm projector MLPs, AdaLN predictor, and sigreg in the main path; EMA path kept only as a control.
Uses a JEPA-based byte compression setup with chunked context and latent prediction for next-byte modeling.

novel_contributions: Byte-level JEPA baseline with no tokenizer
Exact next-byte compression objective added on top of JEPA loss
Byte transformer encoder adapted from the paper's pixel encoder
Strictly causal chunk-context conditioning instead of action-conditioned prediction
Predicted chunk latents injected into the byte scorer so JEPA affects exact likelihood
Retention of core leworldmodel components such as latent prediction, batchnorm projector MLPs, AdaLN predictor, and sigreg
